title: sutera subspicata
intro: Sutera subspicata, also known as the pink purslane or pink pursley, is a flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Sutera subspicata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
